definition: To make goods on a large scale using machinery.
example: The company manufactures car parts for export to Europe.
exampleVi: Công ty sản xuất phụ tùng ô tô để xuất khẩu sang châu Âu.
collocations: manufacture goods, manufacture on a large scale, locally manufactured

definition: The process of making goods in large quantities using machinery, typically in a factory.
example: The manufacturing sector employs thousands of workers in this region.
exampleVi: Ngành sản xuất tạo việc làm cho hàng nghìn công nhân ở khu vực này.
collocations: manufacturing sector, manufacturing plant, manufacturing process, advanced manufacturing

definition: To yield, make or manufacture; to generate.
example: The factory produces over 500 units a day.
exampleVi: Nhà máy sản xuất hơn 500 sản phẩm mỗi ngày.
collocations: produce goods, mass produce, locally produced

definition: The act of producing, making or creating something.
example: The widget making machine is being used for production now.
exampleVi: Máy làm phụ kiện hiện đang được sử dụng để sản xuất.
collocations: production line, increase production, production costs, mass production

definition: A building or group of buildings where goods are manufactured using machinery.
example: The factory operates 24 hours a day to meet demand.
exampleVi: Nhà máy hoạt động 24 giờ một ngày để đáp ứng nhu cầu.
collocations: factory floor, factory worker, run a factory, factory output

definition: A factory or industrial building where goods are manufactured or processed.
example: The company is building a new manufacturing plant in Vietnam.
exampleVi: Công ty đang xây dựng một nhà máy sản xuất mới tại Việt Nam.
collocations: manufacturing plant, plant manager, power plant, plant capacity

definition: A grinding apparatus for substances such as grains, seeds, etc.
example: Pepper has a stronger flavor when it is ground straight from a mill.
exampleVi: Hạt tiêu có hương vị đậm đà hơn khi được xay thẳng từ máy xay.
collocations: steel mill, textile mill, mill worker, run a mill

definition: Economic activity concerned with the processing of raw materials and manufacture of goods.
example: The automotive industry has grown rapidly over the past decade.
exampleVi: Ngành công nghiệp ô tô đã phát triển nhanh chóng trong thập kỷ qua.
collocations: heavy industry, industry standard, industry leader, manufacturing industry

definition: Relating to or characterized by industry, especially manufacturing.
example: The area was once an industrial zone full of factories.
exampleVi: Khu vực này từng là khu công nghiệp đầy nhà máy.
collocations: industrial zone, industrial equipment, industrial revolution, industrial waste

definition: A commodity offered for sale.
example: That store offers a variety of products.  We've got to sell a lot of product by the end of the month.
exampleVi: Cửa hàng đó cung cấp nhiều loại sản phẩm.  Chúng ta phải bán được nhiều sản phẩm vào cuối tháng.
collocations: launch a product, product quality, final product, product line

definition: Matter which may be shaped or manipulated, particularly in making something.
example: Asphalt, composed of oil and sand, is a widely used material for roads.
exampleVi: Nhựa đường, bao gồm dầu và cát, là vật liệu được sử dụng rộng rãi cho đường giao thông.
collocations: raw material, building material, material cost, quality material

definition: In a natural state, not yet processed or manufactured.
example: The factory imports raw materials from several countries.
exampleVi: Nhà máy nhập khẩu nguyên liệu thô từ nhiều quốc gia.
collocations: raw material, raw data, raw product

definition: The act of supplying.
example: supply and demand
exampleVi: cung và cầu
collocations: supply chain, supply and demand, in short supply, power supply

definition: A set of pieces that work together in unison as a mechanism or device.
example: In order to change the bearing, you must first remove the gearbox assembly.
exampleVi: Để thay ổ trục, trước tiên bạn phải tháo cụm hộp số.
collocations: assembly line, final assembly, assembly plant, assembly process

definition: A sequence of connected machines and workers through which a product moves during manufacture.
example: The assembly line stopped when a machine broke down.
exampleVi: Dây chuyền lắp ráp dừng lại khi một máy bị hỏng.
collocations: assembly line, production line, product line, line manager

definition: The machines constituting a production apparatus, in a plant etc., collectively.
example: The factory invested in new machinery to increase output.
exampleVi: Nhà máy đã đầu tư vào máy móc mới để tăng sản lượng.
collocations: heavy machinery, operate machinery, industrial machinery

definition: The tools, machines, or other items needed for a particular purpose.
example: Workers must wear protective equipment on the factory floor.
exampleVi: Công nhân phải mặc thiết bị bảo hộ trên sàn nhà máy.
collocations: safety equipment, heavy equipment, equipment maintenance

definition: A mechanical device intended to make a task easier.
example: Hand me that tool, would you?   I don't have the right tools to start fiddling around with the engine.
exampleVi: Đưa cho tôi dụng cụ đó được không?   Tôi không có công cụ phù hợp để bắt đầu loay hoay với động cơ.
collocations: hand tool, power tool, use a tool, tool kit

definition: A person who works in a particular industry or place, especially manual labor.
example: Factory workers received safety training before starting the job.
exampleVi: Công nhân nhà máy được đào tạo về an toàn trước khi bắt đầu công việc.
collocations: factory worker, skilled worker, worker safety, migrant worker

definition: Work, especially physical work, performed by workers; also the workforce as a whole.
example: Labor costs account for a large part of the total production cost.
exampleVi: Chi phí nhân công chiếm phần lớn tổng chi phí sản xuất.
collocations: labor costs, manual labor, labor force, skilled labor

definition: The amount of goods produced by a factory, machine, or worker.
example: The new equipment increased factory output by 20 percent.
exampleVi: Thiết bị mới đã giúp tăng sản lượng nhà máy lên 20%.
collocations: production output, increase output, output level

definition: The maximum amount that a factory or machine can produce.
example: The plant is operating at full capacity this month.
exampleVi: Nhà máy đang hoạt động hết công suất trong tháng này.
collocations: production capacity, full capacity, storage capacity

definition: The ability to produce goods with the least waste of time, materials, or effort.
example: The new machines improved efficiency on the production line.
exampleVi: Máy móc mới đã cải thiện hiệu quả trên dây chuyền sản xuất.
collocations: improve efficiency, energy efficiency, operational efficiency

definition: The standard of something as measured against other similar products.
example: The factory conducts strict quality checks before shipping products.
exampleVi: Nhà máy tiến hành kiểm tra chất lượng nghiêm ngặt trước khi giao hàng.
collocations: quality control, high quality, quality assurance, quality standards

definition: The process of monitoring and regulating a system to ensure a desired standard.
example: Quality control inspectors check every product before it leaves the plant.
exampleVi: Nhân viên kiểm soát chất lượng kiểm tra từng sản phẩm trước khi xuất xưởng.
collocations: quality control, control process, under control, control system

definition: The condition of being protected from danger, risk, or injury, especially at work.
example: All employees must follow safety procedures on the factory floor.
exampleVi: Tất cả nhân viên phải tuân thủ quy trình an toàn trên sàn nhà máy.
collocations: safety procedures, workplace safety, safety equipment, safety standards

definition: A level of quality or requirement that is generally accepted or expected.
example: The products must meet strict international safety standards.
exampleVi: Sản phẩm phải đáp ứng các tiêu chuẩn an toàn quốc tế nghiêm ngặt.
collocations: safety standard, meet a standard, industry standard, quality standard

definition: The process of keeping machinery or equipment in good working condition.
example: Regular maintenance prevents costly breakdowns on the production line.
exampleVi: Bảo trì định kỳ giúp ngăn ngừa hỏng hóc tốn kém trên dây chuyền sản xuất.
collocations: regular maintenance, maintenance schedule, preventive maintenance

definition: A process or activity that is part of a series of actions, especially in running a factory.
example: The factory suspended operations during the equipment upgrade.
exampleVi: Nhà máy tạm dừng hoạt động trong thời gian nâng cấp thiết bị.
collocations: business operation, resume operation, operation manager, daily operations

definition: Any piece of equipment made for a particular purpose, especially a mechanical or electrical one.
example: There are a number of household devices in a kitchen such as a dishwasher, a garbage disposal, or an electric can opener.
exampleVi: Trong nhà bếp có một số thiết bị gia dụng như máy rửa chén, máy xử lý rác hoặc dụng cụ mở hộp điện.
collocations: electronic device, safety device, device manufacturer

definition: A smaller, self-contained part of a larger entity. Often refers to a manufactured object that is part of a larger device.
example: A CPU is a component of a computer.
exampleVi: CPU là một thành phần của máy tính.
collocations: electronic component, key component, component supplier, component part

definition: A component that, together with others, makes up a whole machine or product.
example: The mechanic ordered a replacement part for the machine.
exampleVi: Thợ máy đã đặt một bộ phận thay thế cho máy.
collocations: spare part, replacement part, machine part, part supplier

definition: The entirety of means whereby a specific production is made existent or task accomplished.
example: Technicians checked the apparatus before starting the experiment.
exampleVi: Kỹ thuật viên kiểm tra thiết bị trước khi bắt đầu thí nghiệm.
collocations: piece of apparatus, testing apparatus, breathing apparatus

definition: A tool or device used for precise measurement, testing, or performing a task.
example: Engineers use precision instruments to measure the parts.
exampleVi: Kỹ sư sử dụng các thiết bị đo chính xác để đo các bộ phận.
collocations: precision instrument, measuring instrument, instrument panel

definition: The act of examining something, often closely.
example: Upon closer inspection, the animal turned out to be a dolphin, not a shark!
exampleVi: Khi kiểm tra kỹ hơn, con vật hóa ra là cá heo chứ không phải cá mập!
collocations: quality inspection, safety inspection, pass inspection, inspection report

definition: The state of being productive, fertile or efficient
example: New machinery boosted productivity across the factory.
exampleVi: Máy móc mới đã thúc đẩy năng suất trên toàn nhà máy.
collocations: increase productivity, labor productivity, productivity gains

definition: The act of fabricating, framing, or constructing; construction; manufacture
example: the fabrication of a bridge, a church, or a government
exampleVi: việc chế tạo một cây cầu, một nhà thờ hoặc một chính phủ
collocations: metal fabrication, fabrication process, fabrication plant

definition: A room or building where goods are made or repaired using tools or machines.
example: The parts are repaired in the maintenance workshop.
exampleVi: Các bộ phận được sửa chữa trong xưởng bảo trì.
collocations: repair workshop, workshop equipment, training workshop

definition: Products that are manufactured, bought, or sold.
example: The warehouse stores finished goods before they are shipped.
exampleVi: Kho lưu trữ thành phẩm trước khi giao hàng.
collocations: finished goods, manufactured goods, goods and services, deliver goods

definition: The action of treating or converting raw materials into a finished product.
example: Food processing plants must follow strict hygiene rules.
exampleVi: Các nhà máy chế biến thực phẩm phải tuân thủ quy tắc vệ sinh nghiêm ngặt.
collocations: data processing, food processing, processing plant, order processing

definition: A building or place designed for a particular purpose, such as manufacturing.
example: The company opened a new production facility overseas.
exampleVi: Công ty đã mở một cơ sở sản xuất mới ở nước ngoài.
collocations: production facility, storage facility, state-of-the-art facility

definition: To use a needle to pass thread repeatedly through (pieces of fabric) in order to join them together.
example: Balls were first made of grass or leaves held together by strings, and later of pieces of animal skin sewn together and stuffed with feathers or hay.
exampleVi: Những quả bóng đầu tiên được làm bằng cỏ hoặc lá được buộc lại với nhau bằng dây, sau đó là những mảnh da động vật được khâu lại với nhau và nhồi lông vũ hoặc cỏ khô.
collocations: sewing machine, sewing needle, learn sewing

definition: The process of designing and making tools used in manufacturing, or the tools themselves.
example: The factory invested in new tooling to produce the parts faster.
exampleVi: Nhà máy đã đầu tư vào dụng cụ mới để sản xuất linh kiện nhanh hơn.
collocations: custom tooling, tooling costs, precision tooling

definition: The process of shaping a material, such as plastic or metal, by pouring it into a mold.
example: The plastic parts are made by injection molding.
exampleVi: Các bộ phận nhựa được làm bằng phương pháp ép phun.
collocations: injection molding, molding process, molding machine

definition: A manufacturing process that shapes metal sheets using a die and press.
example: The metal stamping process produces car body panels quickly.
exampleVi: Quá trình dập kim loại sản xuất các tấm thân xe nhanh chóng.
collocations: metal stamping, stamping press, stamping process

definition: To make by machinery.
example: Precision machining is used to shape the metal parts accurately.
exampleVi: Gia công chính xác được sử dụng để tạo hình các bộ phận kim loại một cách chính xác.
collocations: precision machining, machining process, CNC machining

definition: An act of extracting or the condition of being extracted.
example: Mineral extraction is a major industry in this region.
exampleVi: Khai thác khoáng sản là một ngành công nghiệp lớn ở khu vực này.
collocations: mineral extraction, extraction process, oil extraction

definition: The process of turning fiber into yarn or thread.
example: The mill uses modern machines for cotton spinning.
exampleVi: Nhà máy sử dụng máy móc hiện đại để kéo sợi bông.
collocations: cotton spinning, spinning mill, spinning machine

definition: A manufacturing process in which liquid material is poured into a mold to form a shape.
example: Metal casting is used to produce engine parts.
exampleVi: Đúc kim loại được sử dụng để sản xuất các bộ phận động cơ.
collocations: metal casting, casting process, sand casting

definition: To form something by passing lengths or strands of material over and under one another.
example: This loom weaves yarn into sweaters.
exampleVi: Máy dệt này dệt sợi thành áo len.
collocations: weaving machine, hand weaving, weaving mill

definition: To remove (ore) from the ground.
example: Coal mining remains an important industry in the country.
exampleVi: Khai thác than vẫn là một ngành công nghiệp quan trọng của đất nước.
collocations: coal mining, mining industry, mining company

definition: To fuse or melt two things into one, especially in order to extract metal from ore; to meld
example: Iron ore is heated in a furnace during smelting.
exampleVi: Quặng sắt được nung nóng trong lò trong quá trình luyện kim.
collocations: metal smelting, smelting furnace, smelting process

definition: To shape a metal by heating and hammering.
example: Forging shapes the metal by heating and hammering it into form.
exampleVi: Rèn định hình kim loại bằng cách nung nóng và rèn thành hình dạng mong muốn.
collocations: metal forging, forging process, forging press

definition: To turn thread or yarn into a piece of fabric by forming loops that are pulled through each other. This can be done by hand with needles or by machine.
example: The first generation knitted to order; the second still knits for its own use; the next leaves knitting to industrial manufacturers.
exampleVi: Thế hệ đầu tiên dệt kim theo đơn đặt hàng; chiếc thứ hai vẫn đan để sử dụng riêng; lá tiếp theo đan cho các nhà sản xuất công nghiệp.
collocations: knitting machine, knitting factory, hand knitting

definition: To purify; reduce to a fine, unmixed, or pure state; to free from impurities.
example: to refine gold
exampleVi: luyện vàng
collocations: oil refining, refining process, refining plant
